stemHtml: When a landing is performed with an auto-brake system selected to a high deceleration level…

options.a: the auto-brake system will stop operating below a certain low speed (e.g. 15 kt).
options.b: the anti-skid system will not function.
options.c: this deceleration level may not be constant when the runway has local slippery spots.
options.d: when the system starts braking the deceleration will build up gradually to avoid a strong pitch down at touchdown.
